label: 🤒 Fever / Cold
text:
• Drink plenty of warm fluids and rest.
• Take paracetamol if temperature exceeds 100°F.
• Avoid cold water and chilled foods.
• Monitor temperature twice daily.
• Return immediately if fever exceeds 103°F or lasts more than 3 days.

label: 🦴 Arthritis / Joint Pain
text:
• Rest the affected joint. Avoid heavy lifting.
• Apply warm/cold compress as comfortable.
• Gentle range-of-motion exercises daily.
• Avoid strenuous physical activity.
• Follow-up after 2 weeks or sooner if pain worsens.

label: 🩸 Diabetes Management
text:
• Test blood sugar levels before meals and at bedtime.
• Maintain a low-sugar, low-carbohydrate diet.
• Take medicines as prescribed — do not skip doses.
• Exercise for at least 30 minutes daily.
• Follow-up after 1 month with HbA1c report.

label: ❤️ Hypertension
text:
• Check blood pressure daily and record readings.
• Maintain a low-salt diet. Avoid processed foods.
• Do not skip BP medication.
• Avoid stress and heavy physical exertion.
• Follow-up after 2 weeks with BP log.

label: 🌿 Ayurveda General
text:
• Take medicine on an empty stomach with warm water.
• Avoid sour, spicy, and heavy foods.
• Practice daily yoga and pranayama.
• Maintain regular sleep schedule (10 PM – 6 AM).
• Follow-up after 1 month.

label: 🌸 Homeopathy General
text:
• Avoid coffee, mint, onion, garlic, and camphor during treatment.
• Take medicine 15 minutes before or after food.
• Do not touch tablets — dissolve directly under tongue.
• Avoid strong perfumes and aromatic substances.
• Follow-up after 4 weeks.

label: 🏥 Post-operative Care
text:
• Keep wound/area clean and dry.
• Change dressing as instructed.
• Avoid strenuous activity for 4 weeks.
• Take prescribed antibiotics for the full course.
• Return immediately if redness, swelling, or discharge occurs.

label: 👶 Pediatric
text:
• Give medicine with food to avoid stomach upset.
• Maintain hydration — offer fluids frequently.
• Monitor temperature every 4–6 hours.
• Do not give adult medications.
• Return if child becomes lethargic, refuses food, or fever persists.

label: 🫁 Respiratory / Asthma
text:
• Use inhaler as prescribed — do not skip.
• Avoid dust, smoke, and allergens.
• Drink warm water. Avoid cold or iced drinks.
• Practice deep breathing exercises twice daily.
• Seek emergency care if breathing difficulty increases suddenly.

label: 🍽️ Gastroenterology
text:
• Eat small, frequent meals. Avoid spicy and oily food.
• Do not lie down immediately after eating.
• Avoid coffee, alcohol, and carbonated drinks.
• Take antacids 30 minutes before meals.
• Follow-up after 2 weeks.
